attributes.description: This dashboard gives you high-level insights in the metrics exposed by the ESS billing API.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

embeddableConfig.description: Run rate (ECUs per day) computed as average of the last 7 days of the filtered time period

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  ml_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*ml*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  ml_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*ml*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  ml_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*ml*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  frozen_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*frozen*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  frozen_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*frozen*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  dep_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id),
  frozen_enabled = COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) WHERE ess.billing.sku LIKE "*frozen*"

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY cloud.provider

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY cloud.provider

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY cloud.provider

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.deployment_name

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.deployment_name

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.deployment_name

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.type

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.type

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY ess.billing.deployment_type, ess.billing.type

embeddableConfig.title: ECH Capacity Costs per instance flavors over time
Serverless features per service types over time

sourceDescriptor.esql:
from metrics-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "ess_billing.billing"
| STATS cloud.geo.name=VALUES(cloud.geo.name), `Total spends`=SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu), `Deployment count`=COUNT_DISTINCT(ess.billing.deployment_id) BY cloud.geo.location

attributes.title: [Metrics ESS Billing] Billing dashboard
